mapper.select: select gs.id, gs.goods_id, g.goods_name, gs.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, gs.supply_price, gs.create_time from goods_supplier gs inner join goods g on gs.goods_id = g.id inner join supplier s on gs.supplier_id = s.id where gs.goods_id = #{goodsId} order by gs.id

select gs.id, gs.goods_id, g.goods_name, gs.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, gs.supply_price, gs.create_time from goods_supplier gs inner join goods g on gs.goods_id = g.id inner join supplier s on gs.supplier_id = s.id where gs.supplier_id = #{supplierId} order by gs.id
mapper.delete:
delete from goods_supplier where goods_id in
#{id}

delete from goods_supplier where supplier_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into goods_supplier (goods_id, supplier_id, supply_price, create_time) values (#{goodsId}, #{supplierId}, #{supplyPrice}, now())
mapper.select: select gs.id, gs.goods_id, g.goods_name, gs.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, gs.supply_price, gs.create_time from goods_supplier gs inner join goods g on gs.goods_id = g.id inner join supplier s on gs.supplier_id = s.id order by gs.goods_id, gs.id
